skill.name: flutter-expert
skill.description: Master Flutter development with Dart 3, advanced widgets, and multi-platform deployment. Handles state management, animations, testing, and performance optimization for mobile, web, desktop, and embedded platforms. Use PROACTIVELY for Flutter architecture, UI implementation, or cross-platform features.
skill.summary: Expert guidance for Flutter architecture, UI, testing, performance, security, and multi-platform deployment.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported external command, weak cryptography, system reconnaissance, and network reconnaissance patterns in SKILL.md. Manual review found these are false positives from markdown formatting and Flutter terminology, with no executable code, shell commands, network calls, credential handling, or prompt injection evidence.

content.value_statement: Flutter teams often need architecture, UI, testing, and deployment guidance across several platforms. This skill provides focused Flutter and Dart support for planning, implementation, optimization, and release workflows.
actual_capabilities: Recommends Flutter architecture patterns for mobile, web, desktop, and embedded targets.
Guides state management choices including Riverpod, Bloc, Provider, GetX, MobX, Redux, and Stacked.
Explains performance optimization for widget rebuilds, rendering, memory, images, and app bundle size.
Plans testing strategies for unit, widget, integration, golden, performance, and accessibility tests.
Covers deployment topics including CI/CD, app stores, flavors, signing, monitoring, and crash reporting.
Provides guidance for platform channels, native plugins, secure storage, authentication, and privacy controls.
limitations: The skill is guidance-only and does not include executable automation scripts.
The referenced implementation playbook is not present in the provided file structure.
It may require project files before giving precise implementation advice.
It does not replace testing on real target devices and release environments.

use_cases.title: Plan a New Flutter App
use_cases.description: Define architecture, state management, platform targets, testing scope, and deployment strategy before implementation starts.

use_cases.title: Improve an Existing Flutter Codebase
use_cases.description: Review performance, widget structure, state flow, accessibility, and testing gaps in an active project.

use_cases.title: Prepare Cross-Platform Releases
use_cases.description: Map build flavors, code signing, app store needs, CI/CD steps, monitoring, and platform-specific requirements.

prompt_templates.title: Choose a Flutter Architecture
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner planning a small to medium app
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me choose a Flutter architecture for an app with these features, team size, target platforms, and release timeline.

prompt_templates.title: Design a Responsive Screen
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a responsive Flutter screen for mobile, tablet, and desktop. Include state handling, loading states, errors, and accessibility.

prompt_templates.title: Optimize App Performance
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this Flutter performance issue. Recommend profiling steps, likely causes, widget changes, rendering improvements, and verification tests.

prompt_templates.title: Plan a Multi-Platform Release
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a release plan for this Flutter app across iOS, Android, web, and desktop. Include CI/CD, signing, testing, monitoring, and rollback steps.

output_examples.input: I need architecture guidance for a Flutter app with offline sync and notifications.
output_examples.output: A layered plan covering feature modules, repositories, local storage, synchronization rules, notification handling, state management, and test coverage.

output_examples.input: My Flutter list screen drops frames when scrolling.
output_examples.output: A diagnostic checklist for rebuilds, image loading, list virtualization, profiling with DevTools, and device-based performance verification.

output_examples.input: We are preparing our first app store release.
output_examples.output: A release readiness outline for flavors, signing, store metadata, privacy checks, accessibility, monitoring, and staged rollout planning.

best_practices: Provide target platforms, Flutter version, package constraints, and current architecture before asking for implementation advice.
Ask for testing and accessibility guidance with each feature, not only at the end of development.
Validate performance advice with Flutter DevTools and real devices before release.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for generic Flutter advice without describing project constraints and target platforms.
Do not select a state management library only because it is popular.
Do not treat generated guidance as a substitute for app store, privacy, and device testing requirements.

faq.question: What Flutter topics does this skill cover?
faq.answer: It covers architecture, widgets, state management, performance, testing, platform integration, security, and deployment.

faq.question: Can it help choose between Riverpod, Bloc, Provider, and other options?
faq.answer: Yes. It can compare state management options against app complexity, team experience, testability, and maintenance needs.

faq.question: Does it support Flutter web and desktop work?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill includes responsive design, platform-specific optimization, and deployment guidance for web and desktop targets.

faq.question: Can it generate complete production code?
faq.answer: It can guide and draft implementation approaches, but production code still needs project-specific review and testing.

faq.question: Does it include security guidance?
faq.answer: Yes. It covers secure storage, certificate pinning, authentication tokens, privacy, and runtime hardening concepts.

faq.question: What information should I provide for best results?
faq.answer: Share target platforms, Flutter and Dart versions, current architecture, package choices, constraints, and the exact feature goal.
